mapper.insert: insert into user_subscription (user_id, package_id, start_time, end_time, status, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{packageId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select id, user_id, package_id, start_time, end_time, status, create_time from user_subscription where user_id = #{userId} and status = 1 and (end_time is null or end_time >= #{now}) order by end_time asc, id desc
